text: Lessee includes “bailee” and is a person who leases, offers to lease, or is offered the lease of a motor vehicle for a term exceeding four months.

# Vehicle Code
## Division 1. WORDS AND PHRASES DEFINED [100 - 681]
##### § 371

Lessee includes “bailee” and is a person who leases, offers to lease, or is offered the lease of a motor vehicle for a term exceeding four months.

*(Added by Stats. 1976, Ch. 1284.)*

subsections.text: Lessee includes “bailee” and is a person who leases, offers to lease, or is offered the lease of a motor vehicle for a term exceeding four months.
